TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: aicu a kai , mavan a sinipadjadjaljudjaljun nua caucau (tja sipakakeljakeljangan tua tja varung), namasan ljuqes vavak nua inaqinaljanan. aicu a tja sikiljavaranan a kai, namasan seminamalji a kakudanan uta. sipakeljakeljang tua kinamaretimaljian nu caucauan uta. a kai nuaya, sika maqati itjen a makakeljakeljang.
S.PHON: aiʦu a kai , mavan a sinipaɉaɉaʎuɉaʎun nua ʦauʦau (ʦa sipakakəʎakəʎaŋan tua ʦa varuŋ), namasan ʎuqəs vavak nua inaqinaʎanan. aiʦu a ʦa sikiʎavaranan a kai, namasan səminamaʎi a kakudanan uta. sipakəʎakəʎaŋ tua kinamarətimaʎian nu ʦauʦauan uta. a kai nuaja, sika maqati iʦən a makakəʎakəʎaŋ.
S.FORM: aicu a kai , mavan a sinipadjadjaljudjaljun nua caucau (tja sipakakeljakeljangan tua tja varung), namasan ljuqes vavak nua inaqinaljanan. aicu a tja sikiljavaranan a kai, namasan seminamalji a kakudanan uta. sipakeljakeljang tua kinamaretimaljian nu caucauan uta. a kai nuaya, sika maqati itjen a makakeljakeljang.
S.PHON: aiʦu a kai , mavan a sinipaɉaɉaʎuɉaʎun nua ʦauʦau (ʦa sipakakəʎakəʎaŋan tua ʦa varuŋ), namasan ʎuqəs vavak nua inaqinaʎanan. aiʦu a ʦa sikiʎavaranan a kai, namasan səminamaʎi a kakudanan uta. sipakəʎakəʎaŋ tua kinamarətimaʎian nu ʦauʦauan uta. a kai nuaja, sika maqati iʦən a makakəʎakəʎaŋ.
